# TKSmartCardSlotNFCSession

**Class**

NFC session that’s related to NFC smart card slot which was created.

## Declaration

```swift
class TKSmartCardSlotNFCSession
```

## Overview

Lifetime of this session object is tied to the NFC smart card slot lifetime and once the NFC slot disappears (eg. after a user cancellation, calling end session, or an NFC timeout) the functions will start to fail and return `TKErrorCodeObjectNotFound` error.

## Instance Properties

- **slotName**: Smart card slot name of the NFC slot that was created together with this session.

## Instance Methods

- **end()**: Ends the NFC slot session and dismisses the system-presented NFC UI (if present).
- **update(message:)**: Updates the message of the system-presented NFC UI.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
